planner.summary: Validation plan generated from available files and deterministic analysis outputs.

possible_steps.rationale: Uses generated feature-importance or SHAP artifacts.
Requires sensitive or proxy group attributes in the evaluation split.

missing_evidence.missing_evidence: No model documentation file was supplied.
missing_evidence.impact: Purpose, assumptions, governance, monitoring, and approval evidence cannot be fully validated.
Feature engineering, split design, and hyperparameter decisions cannot be independently traced.

assumptions: Baseline metrics are calculated by Python tools and used as benchmark evidence.

findings.title: Model documentation not supplied
findings.recommendation: Provide model purpose, scope, data description, methodology, limitations, monitoring, governance, and approval evidence.

challenge_questions: What business decision does the model support and where is this documented?
What assumptions and limitations were accepted by model governance?
recommendations: Maintain a complete model document with owner, version, scope, monitoring, and approvals.
limitations: Documentation review is limited because no document was supplied.

findings.title: Outliers detected in numeric features
findings.recommendation: Review outlier treatment and confirm values are plausible.

findings.title: Target class imbalance detected
findings.recommendation: Use imbalance-aware metrics, sampling, or class weights and monitor minority-class performance.

challenge_questions: Which upstream controls prevent target-derived fields from entering production scoring?
How are missing values and outliers treated consistently between training and production?
recommendations: Review outlier treatment and confirm values are plausible.
Use imbalance-aware metrics, sampling, or class weights and monitor minority-class performance.

methodology.summary: Methodology review considered available model artifact, training code, baseline, and reproducibility evidence.

findings.title: Training code not supplied
findings.evidence: The validation package does not include training code.
findings.recommendation: Provide reproducible training code with feature engineering, split logic, hyperparameters, and model artifact creation.

findings.title: Independent validation used a baseline model
findings.evidence: No trained model artifact was supplied, so deterministic analysis trained a baseline model.
findings.recommendation: Provide the candidate model artifact for direct validation before production approval.

challenge_questions: Why was this algorithm selected over simpler challenger models?
How was the train/test split designed to avoid temporal or entity leakage?
recommendations: Provide reproducible training code with feature engineering, split logic, hyperparameters, and model artifact creation.
Provide the candidate model artifact for direct validation before production approval.
limitations: Training-code review is limited by missing evidence.

performance.summary: Performance review interprets Python-calculated metrics only.

findings.title: Performance evidence is acceptable for baseline validation
findings.evidence: Deterministic test metrics were calculated for classification.
findings.recommendation: Compare these results with business thresholds and production challenger models.

challenge_questions: What minimum performance threshold is required for the business use case?
How stable are these metrics across time, segments, and out-of-sample cohorts?
recommendations: Compare these results with business thresholds and production challenger models.

explainability.summary: Explainability review is based on generated Python artifacts.

findings.title: Explainability artifacts generated
findings.evidence: Feature importance and/or SHAP plots were generated by Python tools.
findings.recommendation: Review top drivers for business plausibility and prohibited proxies.

challenge_questions: Do the top model drivers align with business expectations?
Could any high-importance feature act as a proxy for a protected class?
recommendations: Review top drivers for business plausibility and prohibited proxies.

fairness.summary: Fairness review used available group attributes and Python-calculated group metrics.

findings.title: Potential group performance disparity detected
findings.recommendation: Investigate group-level errors, thresholds, and mitigation controls before approval.

challenge_questions: Which protected-class or proxy attributes are approved for fairness testing?
What disparity thresholds trigger remediation or governance escalation?
recommendations: Investigate group-level errors, thresholds, and mitigation controls before approval.

governance.summary: Governance review considered owner, versioning, monitoring, retraining, lineage, and oversight evidence.

findings.title: Monitoring plan is missing or weak
findings.evidence: Monitoring, drift, or retraining triggers were not identified in the supplied evidence.
findings.recommendation: Define monitoring metrics, thresholds, ownership, escalation, and retraining triggers.

findings.title: Approval evidence is missing
findings.evidence: Formal approval evidence was not identified.
findings.recommendation: Document model owner, version, approvers, approval date, and production-use conditions.

challenge_questions: Who owns model performance and issue remediation after deployment?
What thresholds trigger model retirement, recalibration, or retraining?
recommendations: Define monitoring metrics, thresholds, ownership, escalation, and retraining triggers.
Document model owner, version, approvers, approval date, and production-use conditions.

report_writer.executive_summary: Overall risk is MEDIUM. Final decision is insufficient_evidence. Primary reasons: Missing monitoring plan rule triggered., Missing documentation rule triggered.. Insufficient evidence items: candidate model artifact, model documentation, user-supplied dataset.
report_writer.model_overview: Target column: defaulted. Problem type: classification.
report_writer.files_reviewed: dataset: sample_credit_risk.csv, dataset: generated sample credit risk dataset
report_writer.validation_scope: Scope included data quality, methodology, performance, explainability, fairness, governance, and final decisioning.
report_writer.methodology_review: Methodology review considered available model artifact, training code, baseline, and reproducibility evidence.
report_writer.performance_review: Performance review interprets Python-calculated metrics only.
report_writer.explainability_review: Explainability review is based on generated Python artifacts.
report_writer.bias_and_fairness_review: Fairness review used available group attributes and Python-calculated group metrics.
report_writer.governance_review: Governance review considered owner, versioning, monitoring, retraining, lineage, and oversight evidence.
